mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetups AS A LEFT OUTER JOIN members AS B ON B.member_id = A.member_id WHERE A.delete_yn = 'N' AND A.status != 'DELETED'
AND A.status = #{status}
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%')
AND B.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%')
ORDER BY A.created_at DESC

SELECT A.*, C.name as sido_name, B.name as sigungu_name,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetup_applications WHERE meetup_id = A.meetup_id ) AS participant,
DATE_FORMAT(meetup_At, '%Y.%m.%d') as fomatMeetupAt,
(SELECT E.image_path FROM images AS E JOIN meetup_images AS F ON E.image_id = F.image_id WHERE F.meetup_id = A.meetup_id ORDER BY E.image_id ASC LIMIT 1 ) AS image_path, D.category_name,
IF(F.member_id IS NULL, FALSE, TRUE) AS has_like, G.like_cnt FROM meetups AS A LEFT OUTER JOIN sigungus AS B ON B.sigungu_id = A.sigungu_id LEFT OUTER JOIN sidos AS C ON C.sido_id = B.sido_id LEFT OUTER JOIN categories AS D ON D.category_id = A.category_id LEFT OUTER JOIN categories AS P ON P.category_id = D.parent_id LEFT OUTER JOIN meetup_likes AS F ON F.meetup_id = A.meetup_id AND F.member_id = #{memberId} LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT COUNT(meetup_id) as like_cnt, meetup_id FROM meetup_likes GROUP BY meetup_id ) AS G ON G.meetup_id = A.meetup_id WHERE A.delete_yn = 'N' AND A.status != 'DELETED'
AND C.sido_id = #{sidoId}
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%')
AND P.category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY
A.created_at DESC
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetups AS A LEFT OUTER JOIN meetup_likes AS B ON B.meetup_id = A.meetup_id GROUP BY A.meetup_id) DESC
A.meetup_At ASC
A.created_at DESC
LIMIT #{start}, #{end}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetups AS A LEFT OUTER JOIN sigungus AS B ON B.sigungu_id = A.sigungu_id LEFT OUTER JOIN sidos AS C ON C.sido_id = B.sido_id LEFT OUTER JOIN categories AS D ON D.category_id = A.category_id LEFT OUTER JOIN categories AS P ON P.category_id = D.parent_id WHERE A.delete_yn = 'N' AND A.status != 'DELETED'
AND C.sido_id = #{sidoId}
AND A.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{searchText}, '%')
AND P.category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY
A.created_at DESC
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetups AS A LEFT OUTER JOIN meetup_likes AS B ON B.meetup_id = A.meetup_id GROUP BY A.meetup_id) DESC
A.meetup_At ASC
A.created_at DESC

SELECT A.*, B.nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetup_applications WHERE meetup_id = A.meetup_id ) AS participant, F.name as sido_name
FROM meetups AS A JOIN members AS B ON B.member_id = A.member_id JOIN sigungus AS E ON E.sigungu_id = A.sigungu_id JOIN sidos AS F ON F.sido_id = E.sido_id WHERE A.meetup_id = #{meetupId}
SELECT C.image_path FROM meetups AS A JOIN meetup_images AS B ON B.meetup_id = A.meetup_id JOIN images AS C ON C.image_id = B.image_id WHERE A.meetup_id = #{meetupId}
select member_id from members where login_id = #{loginId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO meetups(member_id, title, content, max_participants, min_participants, sigungu_id, category_id, meetup_at) values(#{memberId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{maxParticipants}, #{minParticipants}, #{sigunguId}, #{categoryId}, #{meetupAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE meetups SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, max_participants = #{maxParticipants}, min_participants = #{minParticipants}, address = #{address}, category_id = #{categoryId}, sigungu_id = #{sigunguId}, meetup_at = #{meetupAt}, status = #{status} WHERE meetup_id = #{meetupId}
UPDATE meetup_applications SET status = 'PENDING' WHERE 1=1 AND application_id = #{applicationId}
UPDATE meetup_applications SET status = 'CANCELED' WHERE 1=1 AND application_id = #{applicationId}
mapper.select:
SELECT A.*, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetup_applications WHERE meetup_id = A.meetup_id ) AS participant,
DATE_FORMAT(meetup_At, '%Y.%m.%d') as fomatMeetupAt, DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y.%m.%d') as fomatcreatedAt,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetups WHERE member_id = A.member_id ) AS meetupTotalCount
FROM meetups AS A WHERE A.delete_yn = 'N' AND A.status != 'DELETED' AND A.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY A.created_at DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{end}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetups AS A WHERE A.delete_yn = 'N' AND A.status != 'DELETED' AND A.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY A.created_at DESC

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetups WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND delete_yn = 'N' AND status != 'DELETED' ) AS meetupCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND delete_yn = 'N') AS reviewCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetup_likes WHERE member_id = #{memberId}) AS likeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetup_applications WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND status IN ('APPROVED', 'PENDING')) AS applicationCount

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(B.created_at, '%Y.%m.%d') AS apply_at , B.reject_reason, B.member_id AS apply_member_id, B.status AS apply_status, C.nickname, DATE_FORMAT(A.meetup_At, '%Y.%m.%d') as fomatMeetupAt, A.* FROM meetup_applications AS B JOIN meetups AS A ON A.meetup_id = B.meetup_id JOIN members AS C ON C.member_id = B.member_id WHERE A.delete_yn = 'N' AND A.status != 'DELETED' AND B.status != 'CANCELED' AND B.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY A.created_at DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{end}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM meetup_applications AS B JOIN meetups AS A ON A.meetup_id = B.meetup_id JOIN members AS C ON C.member_id = B.member_id WHERE A.delete_yn = 'N' AND A.status != 'DELETED' AND B.status != 'CANCELED' AND B.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY A.created_at DESC

SELECT C.nickname, DATE_FORMAT(B.created_at, '%Y.%m.%d') AS apply_at, B.status AS apply_status, A.meetup_id, B.member_id, B.application_id FROM meetups AS A JOIN meetup_applications AS B ON B.meetup_id = A.meetup_id JOIN members AS C ON C.member_id = B.member_id WHERE A.delete_yn = 'N' AND A.status != 'DELETED' AND B.status != 'CANCELED' AND A.meetup_id = #{meetupId} ORDER BY B.created_at DESC
select * from sidos
select * from sigungus
SELECT * FROM categories AS A WHERE parent_id IS NULL
SELECT * FROM categories AS A WHERE parent_id IS NOT NULL
